tool.name: read-memory
tool.description:
Read the current agent session's working memory.
- action: one of `list` (default), `last`, `budgeted`, `key` - list: return all items (optionally filter by `type`) - last: return the most recent `n` items (requires `n`) - budgeted: return items selected by the Budgeted Injection algorithm — pinned items always included, non-pinned items sorted by priority descending and accumulated until `maxTokens` is reached (requires `maxTokens`) - key: return the single item matching `key` - type: optional filter for action=list - key: required for action=key - n: required for action=last - maxTokens: required for action=budgeted
Returns a formatted listing of the matching memory items, or an honest error result when no memory store is configured (no provider wired). Empty results from a configured store are a legitimate state and return success with "(no memory items)".

tool-result.output: Memory (list): 2 item(s). - key=user-pref type=note priority=5 [pinned] content: User prefers concise answers. - key=task-ctx type=task content: Current task is to refactor the ORM layer.
Memory (key=user-pref): 1 item(s). - key=user-pref type=note priority=5 [pinned] content: User prefers concise answers.
